---
title: "News & Community Hub"
description: "News, announcements, activities, and community contributions from ISA RC42."
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.news-hub}

::: {.section-inner .section-wide style="margin-top: 2rem;"}

::: {.news-main-grid}

<!-- Left Column: Featured Activity -->
::: {#world-congress-2027 .featured-activity}
::: {.featured-activity-media}
![ISA World Congress of Sociology 2027 Poster](https://www.isa-sociology.org/uploads/imgen/2568-wcs27-poster.jpg)
:::

::: {.featured-activity-content}
[Featured Activity &bull; July 4–10, 2027]{.section-kicker style="margin-bottom: 0.75rem;"}

## XXI ISA World Congress {style="margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-size: 1.6rem;"}

[Global Sociology in Turbulent Times]{style="font-size: 1rem; color: #2b364a; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; display: block;"}

[Join us in Gwangju, South Korea. The event emphasizes inclusivity, connection, dialogue, diversity, and global sociological voices.]{style="color: #475569; font-size: 0.95rem; display: block; margin-bottom: 1rem;"}

[Explore activities &rarr;](../activities/index.qmd){.btn .btn-rc42-primary .btn-sm style="align-self: flex-start;"}
:::
:::

<!-- Right Column: Latest Community Contributions -->
::: {.community-carousel-section}
::: {.d-flex .justify-content-between .align-items-end .mb-3}
::: {}
[Community]{.section-kicker}

## Latest Contributions {style="margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0; font-size: 1.6rem;"}
:::

[View all](community-contributions.qmd){.btn .btn-rc42-secondary .btn-sm .d-none .d-md-inline-flex}
:::

```{=html}
<div id="latest-contributions-container">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary" role="status">
    <span class="visually-hidden">Loading...</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.mt-3 .text-center .d-block .d-md-none}
[View all](community-contributions.qmd){.btn .btn-rc42-secondary .w-100 .btn-sm}
:::
:::

:::


:::
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", async function() {
  const container = document.getElementById('latest-contributions-container');
  
  try {
    const response = await fetch("../data/community_submissions.json");
    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
    }
    let allData = await response.json();
    
    // Sort descending by date_published and take top 4
    allData.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date_published) - new Date(a.date_published));
    const topData = allData.slice(0, 4);
    
    if (topData.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<p class="text-muted">No community contributions are available yet.</p>';
      return;
    }
    
    renderCards(topData);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Failed to load community submissions:", error);
    container.innerHTML = '<p class="text-muted">No community contributions are available yet.</p>';
  }

  function normalizeType(t) {
    if (!t) return 'other';
    const l = t.toLowerCase();
    if (l.includes('news')) return 'news';
    if (l.includes('event')) return 'event';
    if (l.includes('resource')) return 'resource';
    if (l.includes('call') || l.includes('opportunity')) return 'call';
    if (l.includes('publication')) return 'publication';
    if (l.includes('experience')) return 'experience';
    return 'other';
  }
  
  function getTypeImage(type) {
    const normalized = normalizeType(type);
    const imageMap = {
      news: "../images/community-types/news.svg",
      event: "../images/community-types/event.svg",
      resource: "../images/community-types/resource.svg",
      call: "../images/community-types/call.svg",
      publication: "../images/community-types/publication.svg",
      experience: "../images/community-types/experience.svg",
      other: "../images/community-types/other.svg"
    };
    return imageMap[normalized] || imageMap.other;
  }
  
  function getTypeAltText(type) {
    const normalized = normalizeType(type);
    const altMap = {
      news: "News icon",
      event: "Event icon",
      resource: "Resource icon",
      call: "Call icon",
      publication: "Publication icon",
      experience: "Experience icon",
      other: "Other icon"
    };
    return altMap[normalized] || altMap.other;
  }

  function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
    return (unsafe || "").toString()
         .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
         .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
         .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
         .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
         .replace(/'/g, "&#039;");
  }

  function renderCards(data) {
    let html = '<div class="community-carousel-track">';
    data.forEach(item => {
      const title = escapeHtml(item.title);
      const desc = escapeHtml(item.description);
      const type = escapeHtml(item.type);
      const cat = escapeHtml(item.category);
      const date = escapeHtml(item.date_published);
      const url = escapeHtml(item.url || '');
      const org = escapeHtml(item.organization || item.territory || '');
      const lang = escapeHtml(item.language || '');
      const member = escapeHtml(item.member_display_name || '');
      
      const tags = (item.tags || []).map(t => `<span class="badge">${escapeHtml(t)}</span>`).join('');
      const cardTitle = url ? `<a href="${url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">${title}</a>` : title;
      
      const subtitleArray = [type || 'Other'];
      if (cat) subtitleArray.push(cat);
      const subtitle = subtitleArray.join(' &middot; ');
      
      const imgSrc = getTypeImage(item.type);
      const imgAlt = getTypeAltText(item.type);
      
      html += `
        <article class="community-carousel-card">
          <div class="community-icon-panel">
            <img src="${imgSrc}" alt="${imgAlt}">
          </div>
          <div class="community-card-content">
            <div class="meta-chips">${subtitle}</div>
            <h3 class="card-title">${cardTitle}</h3>
            <p class="card-desc">${desc}</p>
            
            <div class="card-footer-meta">
              <span class="meta-item"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> ${date}</span>
              ${org ? `<span class="meta-item"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> ${org}</span>` : ''}
              ${lang ? `<span class="meta-item"><i class="bi bi-translate"></i> ${lang}</span>` : ''}
              ${member ? `<span class="meta-item"><i class="bi bi-person"></i> By ${member}</span>` : ''}
            </div>
            
            ${tags ? `<div class="card-tags">${tags}</div>` : ''}
          </div>
        </article>
      `;
    });
    html += '</div>';
    container.innerHTML = html;
  }
});
</script>
```
